title: Can Large Language Models Generate Observability-Aware Code?
authors: Yongliang Tao, Hongyu Zhang, Pengfei Gao, Minghua Ma, Zhiyu Fan, Yu Kang, Jue Zhang, Si Qin, Liqun Li, Qingwei Lin, Saravan Rajmohan
abstract: Recent advances in coding agents have enabled the generation of increasingly complex software systems. While existing evaluations primarily focus on functional correctness, production systems must expose failure evidence to support observability. In this paper, we present a systematic study of observability in agent-generated systems. We examine whether agents can reconstruct source-level diagnostic semantics by restoring observability artifacts in 10 open-source and 8 industrial repositories. We also evaluate whether these artifacts translate into effective fault signals at runtime through 200 generated microservice systems deployed on Kubernetes with 13 injected faults. Our results reveal a consistent gap between diagnostic semantics at the source level and fault signals (i.e., explicit, fault-specific evidence) at runtime. At the source level, agents partially recover observability artifacts but struggle to capture key diagnostic semantics. At runtime, generated systems expose fault signals for only a small fraction of failures (up to 13.99\%), despite the presence of logging, suggesting that the generated observability artifacts may lack the failure-specific semantics needed to effectively expose faults. We further introduce an observability-oriented skill, which can serve as a guidance to improve both diagnostic semantics and fault-signal exposure, but the gains remain limited, indicating that the gap is not easily addressed. More broadly, our findings suggest that current evaluations focusing primarily on functional correctness may overlook observability as an important dimension of practical software quality.
title_zh: 大型语言模型能否生成可观测性感知的代码？
abstract_zh: 近期，编码智能体在生成日益复杂的软件系统方面取得了进展。然而，现有评估主要关注功能正确性，而生产系统必须暴露故障证据以支持可观测性。本文系统性地研究了智能体生成系统中的可观测性。我们考察了智能体是否能在10个开源仓库和8个工业仓库中通过恢复可观测性工件来重建源代码级别的诊断语义。同时，通过部署在Kubernetes上的200个生成微服务系统（含13种注入故障），评估这些工件能否在运行时转化为有效的故障信号。结果表明，源代码级别的诊断语义与运行时故障信号（即明确、特定于故障的证据）之间存在持续差距。在源代码层面，智能体部分恢复了可观测性工件，但难以捕获关键诊断语义；在运行时，尽管存在日志记录，生成的系统仅能对一小部分故障暴露故障信号（最高13.99%），这表明生成的可观测性工件可能缺乏有效暴露故障所需的故障特定语义。我们进一步引入了一种面向可观测性的技能，该技能可作为提升诊断语义和故障信号暴露的指导，但改进效果仍然有限，表明该差距不易解决。更广泛而言，我们的发现表明，当前主要关注功能正确性的评估可能忽略了可观测性作为实践软件质量的重要维度。

title: Boosting FPGA Performance with Direct BRAM-DSP Paths
authors: Jiajun Hu, Ruthwik Reddy Sunketa, Andrew Boutros, Aman Arora
abstract: Efficient data movement between memory and compute units is a key performance bottleneck in modern FPGA designs, particularly for deep learning (DL) workloads. In typical FPGA architectures, data transfers between block RAMs (BRAMs) and digital signal processing units (DSPs) must traverse the global routing network, leading to increased wirelength, routing congestion, and critical-path delays. Prior work has explored in- and near-BRAM compute architectures to mitigate these issues, but such solutions often require fundamental changes to FPGA architecture and CAD tools, limiting their commercial viability. This paper proposes a lightweight architectural enhancement that introduces a dedicated direct connection between BRAM and DSP blocks, enabling BRAM data to be consumed by DSPs without passing through the global interconnect. We also enhance the placement algorithm to recognize these BRAM-DSP macro blocks. The proposed architectural change incurs negligible area and delay overhead and does not affect non-DL benchmarks, while the proposed CAD remains compatible with the baseline architecture, where it yields negligible change in quality-of-results (QoR). On an Agilex-10-like FPGA, the proposed architecture and CAD updates deliver up to +25% Fmax and -49% wirelength on common DL layer designs.
title_zh: 利用直接BRAM-DSP路径提升FPGA性能
abstract_zh: 在现代FPGA设计中，内存与计算单元之间的高效数据移动是关键的性能瓶颈，尤其对于深度学习工作负载而言。在典型的FPGA架构中，块RAM（BRAM）与数字信号处理单元（DSP）之间的数据传输必须经过全局路由网络，导致线长增加、布线拥塞以及关键路径延迟。先前的工作探索了在BRAM内部及近BRAM的计算架构以缓解这些问题，但这类解决方案通常需要对FPGA架构和CAD工具进行根本性修改，限制了其商业可行性。本文提出了一种轻量级的架构增强方案，通过引入BRAM和DSP模块之间的专用直连路径，使BRAM数据能够无需经过全局互连网络即可被DSP直接消费。同时，我们还增强了布局算法以识别这些BRAM-DSP宏块。所提出的架构改动在面积和延迟上的开销可忽略不计，且不影响非深度学习基准测试；而所提出的CAD方法仍与基线架构兼容，对质量结果（QoR）的影响极微。在类似Agilex-10的FPGA上，所提出的架构和CAD更新在常见的深度学习层设计中实现了最高+25%的Fmax提升和-49%的线长降低。

title: Evaluating Fine-Tuning and Metrics for Neural Decompilation of Dart AOT Binaries
authors: Raafat Abualazm, Ayman AboElhassan, Amr G. Wassal
abstract: Neural decompilation is increasingly studied as a code-generation problem, yet its evaluation methodology remains underdeveloped for modern languages. We present a systematic empirical study of fine-tuning effectiveness and metric validity for Dart Ahead-of-Time (AOT) neural decompilation. We evaluate six fine-tuned model variants across three base architectures (4B-8B parameters) using three metrics: CodeBLEU, compile@k, and pass@k on a new 154-task HumanEval-Dart benchmark. Our study yields three principal findings grounded in paired task-level statistical tests. First, no fine-tuning configuration produces a statistically significant pass@k improvement. The sole positive case yields +0.71 pp (McNemar p=0.21), while fine-tuning the strongest base (Qwen3-8B) causes a highly significant regression of -5.65 pp (p<0.001). This capacity-dependent trend is consistent across architectures but needs broader scale sweeps. Second, cross-lingual interference from Swift training is highly significant at 4B (-2.66 pp, p<0.001) but statistically indistinguishable from zero at 8B, consistent with the scaling hypothesis. Third, we demonstrate metric divergence: CodeBLEU and compile@k can improve significantly while pass@k moves in the opposite direction. This has implications for any LLM code generation task where fine-tuning targets superficial similarity. Error analysis reveals assembly sequence length is the strongest predictor of task difficulty (p=0.001), with a capability cliff at 200 instructions. We contribute the HumanEval-Dart benchmark, a Dart-adapted CodeBLEU, and empirical evidence that pass@k must be the primary evaluation metric for neural decompilation.
title_zh: 评估Dart AOT二进制文件神经反编译的微调与度量
abstract_zh: 神经反编译作为代码生成问题日益受到研究关注，但其对现代语言的评估方法学仍不完善。我们针对Dart语言提前编译（AOT）的神经反编译，系统开展了微调有效性与指标有效性的实证研究。基于三种基础架构（4B-8B参数）评估了六种微调模型变体，在包含154个任务的HumanEval-Dart新基准上使用三项指标：CodeBLEU、compile@k和pass@k。通过配对任务级统计检验，我们得出三项主要发现。第一，没有任何微调配置能带来统计显著的pass@k提升。唯一的正向案例仅提升0.71个百分点（McNemar检验p=0.21），而对最强基础模型（Qwen3-8B）进行微调反而导致高度显著的性能倒退（下降5.65个百分点，p<0.001）。这种能力依赖趋势在不同架构间一致，但需更广规模扫描验证。第二，来自Swift训练的跨语言干扰在4B规模下高度显著（下降2.66个百分点，p<0.001），但在8B规模下与零无统计差异，符合规模假说。第三，我们证实了指标分歧：CodeBLEU和compile@k可能显著提升，而pass@k却反向变动。这适用于任何微调目标针对表面相似性的大型语言模型代码生成任务。错误分析表明，汇编序列长度是任务难度的最强预测因子（p=0.001），在200条指令处存在能力断崖。我们贡献了HumanEval-Dart基准、适配Dart语言的CodeBLEU，以及证明pass@k必须作为神经反编译主要评估指标的实证证据。

title: Multi-Channel Spread-Spectrum Code Watermarking
authors: Soohyeon Choi, Debin Gao, Yue Duan
abstract: Attributing code to the large language model that produced it is essential for provenance, licensing, and misuse accountability, yet no deployed watermark meets this need. Generation-time schemes require access to the producing model and cannot be applied to third-party code, while post-hoc schemes work on any code but carry at most 4 bits of payload, far too few to distinguish the many deployed model configurations. We present multi-channel spread-spectrum watermarking, the first post-hoc, training-free code watermark with a 24-bit payload and formal robustness guarantees. The scheme encodes bits in variable naming conventions and in eight pairs of semantically equivalent code patterns, and a keyed pseudo-random permutation maps every site to a codeword bit so that each bit receives multiple independent votes. Majority voting absorbs distributed corruption, while an outer Reed-Solomon code recovers the identifier when concentrated channel attacks defeat the vote, yielding provable robustness bounds for formatting, syntactic, and structural attacks. Across 1,750 Python files from CodeNet and from GPT-4.1 and Llama-4 generations, the watermark achieves 100% clean-detection accuracy with zero false positives. Under 17 attack types, it recovers the identifier at 97.6% accuracy under 8 variable renames and 94.1% under 10% random per-site corruption, while the strongest post-hoc baseline collapses to 0% under any single-transform attack. Embedding and detection together take under 200 ms on CPU without training data or GPU.
title_zh: 多通道扩频码水印
abstract_zh: 将大型语言模型生成的代码归因于其来源，对于溯源、许可和滥用问责至关重要，但目前尚无已部署的水印方案能满足这一需求。生成阶段的水印方案需要访问生成模型本身，无法应用于第三方代码；而事后水印方案虽可适用于任意代码，但最多仅能承载4位有效载荷，远不足以区分众多已部署的模型配置。我们提出多通道扩频水印技术，这是首个具备24位有效载荷和形式化鲁棒性保证的事后、免训练代码水印方案。该方案将信息编码在变量命名约定以及八对语义等价的代码模式中，并通过密钥伪随机排列将每个代码位置映射到对应码字比特位，使得每个比特位都能获得多个独立投票。多数投票机制可吸收分布式破坏，而当集中式信道攻击使投票失效时，外层的里德-所罗门码能恢复标识符，从而在格式化、句法和结构攻击下提供可证明的鲁棒性边界。在来自CodeNet数据集以及GPT-4.1和Llama-4生成的1750个Python文件测试中，该水印方案实现了100%的纯净检测准确率且零误报。面对17种攻击类型，在8个变量重命名攻击下标识符恢复准确率达97.6%，在10%随机逐位破坏下仍达94.1%，而现有最强的事后基线方案在任意单一变换攻击下准确率即骤降至0%。嵌入与检测过程在CPU上总计耗时不足200毫秒，无需训练数据或GPU支持。

title: PCBWorld: A Benchmark Environment for Engine-Grounded PCB Design Automation
authors: Hyungseok Song, Junseok Park, Won-Seok Choi, Seohui Bae, Han-Seul Jeong, Youngjoon Park, Soonyoung Lee
abstract: PCB routing is the task of connecting the nets of a board with copper traces under strict design rules, yet learning-based methods still lag behind rule-based routers. We introduce PCBWorld, an open-source engine-grounded PCB routing environment built on the KiCad EDA engine. As a human engineer does, agents in PCBWorld interactively route a board through the engine's native operations, using its Design Rule Check (DRC) feedback to keep the routing within the design rules. The environment supports both RL policies and tool-using LLM agents. Alongside the environment, PCBWorld-Bench provides three dataset families in KiCad's native board format (.kicad_pcb), covering two types of controllable synthetic instances and 679 real open-source boards. It scores any completed board with eight engine-checked evaluation metrics, regardless of the routing method. In our experiments, agents in PCBWorld consistently outperformed grid-action RL policies and open-loop LLM baselines, and an RL policy trained only on synthetic boards transferred zero-shot to real boards, approaching rule-based routers. These results position the engine-grounded, interactive approach of PCBWorld as a promising foundation for advancing the routing ability of both RL and LLM agents.
title_zh: PCBWorld：一个基于引擎的PCB设计自动化基准环境
abstract_zh: PCB布线是指在严格的设计规则下，用铜走线连接电路板上的网络的任务，然而基于学习的方法仍然落后于基于规则的路由器。我们介绍了PCBWorld，这是一个基于KiCad EDA引擎构建的开源引擎接地PCB布线环境。如同人类工程师的工作方式，PCBWorld中的代理通过引擎的原生操作交互式地布线，并利用其设计规则检查（DRC）反馈来确保布线符合设计规则。该环境同时支持强化学习（RL）策略和工具使用的LLM代理。与该环境配套，PCBWorld-Bench提供了三个数据集系列，采用KiCad的原生板级格式（.kicad_pcb），涵盖两类可控合成实例以及679个真实开源电路板。它使用八项引擎检查的评估指标对任何完成的电路板进行评分，无论采用何种布线方法。在我们的实验中，PCBWorld中的代理始终优于基于网格动作的RL策略和开环LLM基线，且仅在合成电路板上训练的RL策略能够零样本迁移到真实电路板，性能接近基于规则的路由器。这些结果表明，PCBWorld这种基于引擎、交互式的方法为提升RL和LLM代理的布线能力提供了有前景的基础。

title: Code-Level Cost Function Generation for Spatial Image Steganography Using RAG-Enhanced Large Language Models
authors: Yige Wang, Shiqi Yi, Hanzhou Wu
abstract: Designing cost functions of adaptive steganography traditionally requires extensive manual tuning, while deep learning methods lack interpretability. Although large language models (LLMs) offer an automated alternative via evolutionary generation, they often violate domain specific mathematical constraints due to a lack of explicit domain knowledge. To address this problem, we propose a novel evolutionary system focused on exploiting Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enhanced LLMs for the automatic code-level generation of spatial steganography cost functions. This system incorporates a core Self Evolving RAG (SE-RAG) module, wherein a Code Semantic Signature (CSS) translates procedural code into aligned queries, retrieving explicit guidance from static literature and dynamic experience knowledge bases to steer the LLM generation process. A dedicated feedback mechanism then continuously refines the dynamic knowledge base with successful optimization strategies. Extensive experiments on the BOSSBase and BOWS2 datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently achieves higher steganographic security than existing automatically designed methods, and increases the average code execution rate by 46.3% while reducing the search cost by 26.1%, thereby highlighting the effectiveness, efficiency, and potential of combining LLMs with domain-specific knowledge in the field of automatic steganographic algorithm generation.
title_zh: 利用RAG增强的大语言模型进行空间图像隐写的代码级代价函数生成
abstract_zh: 传统自适应隐写术成本函数的设计通常依赖大量人工调参，而深度学习方法又缺乏可解释性。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）通过进化生成为自动化替代方案提供了可能，但由于缺乏显式领域知识，其生成结果常违反特定数学约束。针对这一问题，我们提出了一种新型进化系统，重点利用检索增强生成（RAG）增强型LLM，实现空间隐写术成本函数的自动化代码级生成。该系统包含核心的自进化RAG（SE-RAG）模块，其中代码语义签名（CSS）将过程式代码转化为对齐查询，从静态文献库和动态经验知识库中检索显式指导信息，从而引导LLM生成过程。专用反馈机制则不断用成功优化策略完善动态知识库。在BOSSBase和BOWS2数据集上的大量实验表明，所提框架在隐写安全性上持续优于现有自动化设计方法，并将平均代码执行率提升46.3%，同时将搜索成本降低26.1%，这凸显了将LLM与领域知识结合在自动隐写算法生成领域的有效性、高效性与潜力。

title: GPU-Accelerated Effective Resistance Analysis for 3D IC Power Delivery Network
authors: Jingchao Hu, Cheng Zhuo, Zhou Jin
abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) integration is a critical technique for enhancing transistor density, improving power efficiency, and reducing interconnect delays. However, as current demands and design complexity increase, power deliver networks (PDNs) are facing growing challenges.Careful planning of through-silicon vias (TSVs) is essential for ensuring reliable PDNs, where effective resistance serves as a vital metric for the reliability. Ill-planned TSVs often cause 3D IC with unevenly distributed effective resistance and consequently severer IR Drop.In this paper, we propose a GPU-accelerated framework on accurate effective resistance analysis for early stage 3D IC PDNs. The proposed framework achieves a speedup of 5 to 6 orders of magnitude compared to the conventional direct solver, while maintaining negligible deviations in both maximum and average relative errors.
title_zh: GPU加速的三维集成电路电源传输网络有效电阻分析
abstract_zh: 三维（3D）集成是提高晶体管密度、改善能效以及减少互连延迟的关键技术。然而，随着电流需求与设计复杂度的增加，电源分配网络（PDNs）正面临日益严峻的挑战。对硅通孔（TSVs）进行精心规划对于确保可靠的PDN至关重要，其中有效电阻是衡量其可靠性的关键指标。设计不当的TSV常常导致三维集成电路中有效电阻分布不均，进而引发更严重的IR压降。本文提出了一种基于GPU加速的框架，用于早期三维集成电路PDN的精确有效电阻分析。与传统的直接求解器相比，该框架实现了5至6个数量级的加速，同时最大相对误差和平均相对误差均保持在可忽略的偏差范围内。

title: Articulating Assumptions in AI-Generated Scientific Analyses through Task Decomposition
authors: Ahmed Hammad, Mihoko Nojiri
abstract: Scientific results produced by LLM generated analysis code must be understandable and reproducible. However, uncertainty can arise at different stages of the process, both in the original natural language specification and in the generated implementation. As a result, even executable code may not provide a clear understanding of which quantities are being computed or which assumptions determine the final results. To address this challenge, we introduce quantity grounded semantic differencing, a multi-agent framework for analyzing and comparing scientific programs generated by LLMs. The framework assigns code generation, execution, tracing, and validation to separate agents, allowing it to reconstruct how key output quantities are produced and to identify differences between the intended analysis and the implemented code. We also introduce a module that inspects ambiguities in the initial user instruction and suggests alternative rewrites before code generation. Its modular design enables application to different scientific domains by replacing domain specific resources while preserving the same workflow. We validate the framework on representative collider physics analyses. The results demonstrate that the modular task decomposition enhances both transparency and reliability relative to the previous single prompt approach, while enabling substantially smaller models to execute the complete workflow.
title_zh: 在AI生成的科学分析中通过任务分解阐明假设
abstract_zh: 由大语言模型生成的分析代码所产生的科学结果必须既易于理解又具有可重复性。然而，在流程的不同阶段（无论是原始自然语言规范还是生成的代码实现中）都可能产生不确定性。因此，即使是可执行的代码，也可能无法清晰说明正在计算哪些量，或者哪些假设决定了最终结果。为解决这一挑战，我们引入了数量驱动的语义差分方法——一个用于分析和比较LLM生成的科学程序的多智能体框架。该框架将代码生成、执行、追踪和验证任务分配给不同的智能体，从而能够重构关键输出量的产生过程，并识别预期分析与实现代码之间的差异。我们还引入了一个模块，用于检查用户初始指令中的歧义，并在代码生成前建议替代性改写方案。其模块化设计允许通过替换领域特定资源来应用于不同的科学领域，同时保持相同的工作流程。我们针对代表性对撞机物理分析验证了该框架。结果表明，与之前的单提示方法相比，模块化任务分解增强了透明度和可靠性，同时使规模小得多的模型也能执行完整工作流程。

title: The Balkanization of Execution-Security Research for AI Coding Agents: Isolation, Access Control, and Time-of-Check-to-Time-of-Use Vulnerabilities
authors: Mohammadreza Rashidi
abstract: AI coding agents now read repositories, call tools, and execute shell commands with limited human oversight, and a fast-growing body of work studies whether the execution layer around them is actually safe. That literature is scattered. Papers on sandbox isolation, capability and access control, policy enforcement, time-of-check-to-time-of-use (TOCTOU) races, Model Context Protocol (MCP) threats, identity delegation, execution provenance, network egress control, and static analysis of agent-generated code are published independently and rarely cite one another. We systematize 39 papers published between 2023 and 2026 into 17 categories, each verified directly against its source. The same verification protocol also confirms four disclosed, patched CVEs directly affecting production agent harnesses. Reading across categories surfaces five cross-cutting gaps that no single paper addresses. (1) Isolation architectures and capability models are almost never evaluated against one another on a shared benchmark. (2) Policy-enforcement studies report failure rates from 69% to 98% of real denylists, yet no isolation paper re-evaluates its own defense under that adversarial setting. (3) TOCTOU and MCP threats are analyzed as separate literatures despite both being instances of the same state-validation problem. (4) Every enforcement mechanism assumes an honest policy author, leaving policy-authoring error itself unaddressed. (5) Benign but out-of-scope agent actions occurring at rates up to 17.1% under realistic prompting are addressed by no access-control or capability paper in the corpus. Existing broader surveys of agentic AI security discuss sandboxing only as one item among many defenses, leaving execution security without a dedicated systematization. This paper is written to fill that gap. We conclude with a research agenda directed at the five gaps.
title_zh: AI编码代理执行安全研究的巴尔干化：隔离、访问控制与检查时间到使用时间漏洞
abstract_zh: 如今，AI编码代理可以在有限人工监督的情况下读取代码仓库、调用工具并执行Shell命令，而围绕其执行层安全性的研究正在迅速增长。相关文献分布零散。关于沙箱隔离、能力与访问控制、策略执行、检查时间到使用时间（TOCTOU）竞态、模型上下文协议（MCP）威胁、身份委托、执行溯源、网络出站控制以及代理生成代码的静态分析等论文独立发表，且极少互相引用。我们将2023至2026年间发表的39篇论文系统归纳为17个类别，每个类别均直接对照原始文献进行验证。同一验证协议也确认了四个直接影响生产代理框架的已披露并修复的CVE漏洞。跨类别阅读揭示了五个现有论文均未涵盖的横向缺口：（1）隔离架构与能力模型几乎从未在共享基准上相互评估；（2）策略执行研究报告真实黑名单的失败率在69%至98%之间，但没有任何隔离论文在对抗性场景下重新评估自身防御能力；（3）TOCTOU与MCP威胁被作为独立文献分别分析，尽管两者本质上是同一状态验证问题的不同实例；（4）每种强制机制均假定策略制定者诚实，导致策略制定本身的错误未被关注；（5）在真实提示条件下，良性但超出范围的操作出现频率高达17.1%，但现有文献中没有任何访问控制或能力论文对此加以处理。现有的代理型AI安全综述仅将沙箱作为众多防御措施之一进行讨论，导致执行安全领域缺乏专门的系统化研究。本文旨在填补这一空白。我们最终针对上述五个缺口提出了一份研究议程。

title: An Experimental Design Approach to Evaluating Agentic AI's Autonomous Model Discovery
authors: Hao He, Xueying Liu, Chris J. Kuhlman, Xinwei Deng
abstract: Large language model coding agents increasingly perform open-ended data modeling and analysis. These agents are stochastic and adaptive, and therefore their autonomous model discovery behavior cannot be adequately characterized by a single benchmark run. In this work, we propose an experimental design and analysis framework for systematically evaluating this discovery process, quantifying its variability, and identifying important factors. The proposed framework treats these agents as stochastic model-discovery operators, which map task-specific discovery data and an optimization target to a fitted model. Specifically, we investigate two such operators, Codex and Claude Code, under controlled experimental factors including agent's reasoning effort, task, optimization metric, and composition of training data. For each agent-task-metric combination, regression models and inference are conducted for multiple responses such as output quality, dollar cost, wall-clock time, and process complexity. Furthermore, we develop a utility-aligned canonical decomposition to characterize the dominant direction of the reasoning-effort effect and to assess whether that direction aligns with a performance-cost utility direction. The proposed framework is demonstrated on a testbed of networked word-forming games with insightful findings on reasoning effort with respect to cost and process complexity.
title_zh: 一种评估智能体AI自主模型发现的实验设计方法
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型编码代理在执行开放式的数据建模与分析任务时，其能力日益增强。这些代理具有随机性和自适应性，因此仅凭单一基准测试运行无法充分刻画其自主模型发现行为。本研究提出了一套实验设计与分析框架，用于系统评估这一发现过程、量化其变异性并识别关键影响因素。该框架将此类代理视为随机性模型发现算子，这些算子能够根据任务特定的发现数据和优化目标，生成拟合模型。具体而言，我们考察了Codex和Claude Code两种算子，并控制了包括代理推理努力程度、任务类型、优化指标及训练数据组成在内的实验变量。针对每个代理-任务-指标组合，我们通过回归模型和推断方法分析输出质量、成本耗费、运行时间及流程复杂度等多个响应变量。此外，我们开发了一种与效用对齐的经典分解方法，以表征推理努力效应主导方向，并评估该方向是否与性能-成本效用方向一致。该框架在基于网络的文字组合游戏测试平台上得到验证，揭示了推理努力与成本及流程复杂度之间富有洞见的关系。

title: Harnessing Code Agents for Automatic Software Verification
authors: Shuangxiang Kan, Shuanglong Kan, Sebastian Ertel
abstract: Formal verification offers the strongest guarantee of software correctness, but it does not scale: the proofs demanded by interactive theorem provers such as Coq require enormous expert effort. Large language models (LLMs) promise to generate these proofs automatically, yet existing approaches wire a fixed, human-designed proof strategy into the system and constrain the model to follow it (retrieving premises and predicting tactics one step at a time, or splitting goals by divide-and-conquer), and still prove only a fraction of their target theorems. We show that imposing such a strategy is unnecessary and limiting. Handing the whole lemma to a general LLM code agent (for example, Claude Code), free to choose its own approach, and wrapping it in a verification harness is both simpler and more effective, achieving full coverage: every targeted lemma proved, with no failures and no Coq expert intervention. The agent writes the proofs under feedback and hard constraints from the harness that keep each one sound (accepted only when the prover's kernel closes it), complete (no obligation left unproved or silently dropped), and terminating (no divergent tactics). We evaluate this harness plus code agent along three dimensions. (1) Core logic: on Iris, the state-of-the-art separation logic for concurrent and memory-manipulating programs, Aria proves all 4,257 lemmas of the four core modules and the 217 lemmas verifying Rust's standard libraries built on it, fully automatically. (2) Comparison with prior LLM provers: on reglang, where prior provers manage barely one in eight, Aria proves all 318. (3) Generality: on iris-lean, the unfinished Lean 4 port of Iris, it proves 72 not-yet-ported lemmas, showing the approach is not specific to Coq. A state-of-the-art model (Claude Opus 4.7) can write proofs for verified software development fully and automatically.
title_zh: 利用代码代理实现自动软件验证
abstract_zh: 形式化验证提供了软件正确性最强的保障，但难以规模化：交互式定理证明器（如Coq）所需证明需要大量专家投入。大语言模型（LLMs）有望自动生成这些证明，但现有方法将固定的、人工设计的证明策略嵌入系统，并限制模型遵循该策略（例如逐步检索前提并预测策略，或采用分治法拆分目标），然而仍只能证明目标定理中的一小部分。我们指出，强加此类策略既无必要，也限制了能力。将整个引理交给通用LLM代码智能体（如Claude Code），让其自由选择方法，并将其封装在验证框架中，既更简单也更有效，实现了完全覆盖：每个目标引理均被证明，无失败，也无需Coq专家介入。该智能体在框架的反馈和硬约束下编写证明，这些约束确保每个证明都是可靠的（仅在证明器内核关闭时接受）、完整的（没有未证明或悄悄丢弃的义务）和可终止的（无发散策略）。我们从三个维度评估该框架加代码智能体。（1）核心逻辑：在Iris（针对并发和内存操作程序的最先进分离逻辑）上，Aria自动证明了四个核心模块的全部4,257个引理，以及基于它验证Rust标准库的217个引理，完全自动化。（2）与先前LLM证明器的比较：在reglang上，先前证明器仅能处理八分之一，而Aria证明了全部318个。（3）通用性：在iris-lean（Iris到Lean 4的未完成移植）上，它证明了72个尚未移植的引理，表明该方法不局限于Coq。最先进的模型（Claude Opus 4.7）能够完全自动地为经过验证的软件开发编写证明。

title: What Resolve Rate Hides: Trajectory Structure Diagnostics for Coding Agents
authors: Rui Shu, Chun Yong Chong, Xin Zhou, Yun Peng, Zihan Wu, Xu Han, Zeyang Zhuang, Guowen Yuan, Yuan Wang
abstract: Coding agents are ranked almost entirely by resolve rate: whether their final patch passes the target tests. Yet two agents can reach the same outcome through very different processes, and a single pass/fail label says nothing about why a run failed or why an accepted run spent extra steps, time, or tokens. This process evidence lives in the trajectory, which records a run's searches, reads, edits, tool calls, validation, and reversions. However, raw traces are heterogeneous and hard to compare across runs. We present TraceProbe, a trajectory-diagnostic framework that recovers what resolve rate hides. TraceProbe normalizes each raw run into a canonical nine-type action taxonomy with deterministic effect labels, then applies two rule-based modules: Insight names single-trajectory anti-patterns adapted from established debugging practice (e.g., search loops, verification skips), while Converge aligns pairs of runs and classifies where their behavior diverges under controlled references. Applying TraceProbe to 2,500 trajectories from five production settings on SWE-Bench Verified, we find that (i) file choice is too coarse to separate success from failure, whereas function selection and completion behavior localize it; (ii) Insight anti-patterns act mainly as corpus-level difficulty clues, with search loops the most stable; and (iii) even resolved runs differ in how quickly they reach relevant code and how much failed work they incur. Trajectory structure thus adds auditable diagnostic context to outcomes by localizing inspection targets, suggesting failure hypotheses, and prioritizing runs for review.
title_zh: 解决率所隐藏的：面向编程代理的轨迹结构诊断
abstract_zh: 编程智能体的排名几乎完全取决于修复率：其最终补丁是否通过目标测试。然而，两个智能体可能通过截然不同的过程达到相同结果，而单个通过/失败标签既不能说明运行失败的原因，也无法揭示一次成功运行为何会花费额外的步骤、时间或令牌。这种过程证据存在于轨迹中，轨迹记录了智能体运行的搜索、读取、编辑、工具调用、验证和回退。然而，原始轨迹是异质的，难以在不同运行之间进行比较。我们提出TraceProbe，这是一个轨迹诊断框架，能够揭示修复率所隐藏的信息。TraceProbe将每次原始运行标准化为一种包含九种标准动作类型的分类体系，并附有确定性效果标签，然后应用两个基于规则的模块：Insight模块从成熟的调试实践中提取单次轨迹的反模式（例如，搜索循环、验证跳过），而Converge模块则对齐成对运行，并在受控参考条件下对其行为差异进行分类。将TraceProbe应用于SWE-Bench Verified上五个生产环境中的2500条轨迹，我们发现：（i）文件选择过于粗糙，无法区分成功与失败，而函数选择和完成行为则能定位问题；（ii）Insight反模式主要作为语料级别的难度线索，其中搜索循环最为稳定；（iii）即使已解决的运行在到达相关代码的速度以及产生的失败工作量方面也存在差异。因此，轨迹结构通过定位检查目标、建议失败假设以及对运行进行优先审查，为结果增加了可审计的诊断上下文。

title: Agents That Teach: Towards Designing Incidental Learning Back into AI-Assisted Software Development
authors: Rohit Mehra, Samdyuti Suri, Prithviraj K Tagadinamani, Kapil Singi, Vikrant Kaulgud, Adam P. Burden
abstract: AI coding agents are rapidly reshaping how software is built, with developers increasingly delegating substantial coding tasks to autonomous agents in pursuit of higher productivity. While these gains are real, they come at the cost of incidental learning. Developers historically acquired informal knowledge through effortful problem-solving, and this has long shaped how software engineering expertise develops. However, with over-reliance on agentic coding, unpracticed skills could atrophy silently over time. As this learning pathway is short-circuited, developers risk silently accruing Knowledge Debt, a developer-level analogue of Technical Debt, where changes the agent executes that the developer cannot fully understand accrue over time. In this paper, we argue that incidental learning will not re-emerge on its own and must be consciously designed back into developer-agent interactions, and propose six design principles to guide such systems. We then present "SHIELD", a multi-agent system grounded in the notion of "agents that teach", that operationalizes these principles by leveraging the AI coding agent's own reasoning to surface contextual, out-of-band learning moments without disrupting developer flow. Through this work, we envision a path toward learning-aware development environments where productivity and learning are complementary, not competing.
title_zh: 教学型智能体：将附带学习重新融入AI辅助软件开发的探索
abstract_zh: AI编码代理正在迅速重塑软件的构建方式，开发者越来越多地将大量编码任务委托给自主代理，以追求更高的生产力。尽管这些收益是真实的，但它们是以附带学习的代价为代价的。开发者历史上通过费力的解决问题来获取非正式知识，这长期塑造了软件工程专业知识的形成方式。然而，过度依赖代理编码可能会使未经实践的技能随时间悄然萎缩。随着这种学习路径被短路，开发者面临悄然累积"知识债务"的风险——这是技术债务在开发者层面的对应物，即代理执行而开发者无法完全理解的变更会随时间累积。本文认为，附带学习不会自行重现，必须有意识地将它重新设计回开发者-代理交互中，并提出了六项设计原则来指导此类系统。接着，我们介绍了"SHIELD"——一个基于"教学型代理"概念的多代理系统，它通过利用AI编码代理自身的推理能力来呈现情境化的带外学习时刻，同时不干扰开发者的工作流。通过这项工作，我们设想了一条通往学习感知型开发环境的道路，其中生产力与学习相辅相成，而非相互竞争。

title: SWE-Review: Closing the Loop on Issue Resolution with Agentic Code Review
authors: Ruoyu Wang, Jierun Chen, Shaowei Wang, Chaofan Tao, Sidi Yang, Yuxin Jiang, Kim-Hui Yap, Lifeng Shang, Xiaohui Li, Haoli Bai
abstract: Coding agents increasingly generate pull requests (PRs) for real-world software issues, yet one-shot PR generation remains open-loop: the PR is proposed without systematic review, diagnosis, or revision. We introduce \textbf{SWE-Review}, a framework for closing this loop with agentic code review. Given an issue and an AI-generated PR, a reviewer agent explores the repository, decides whether the PR should be accepted, and provides structured feedback for revision. We evaluate this setting with our proposed \textbf{SWE-Review-Bench} to measure both review correctness and downstream revision usefulness. We further curate \textbf{SWE-Review-Traj} dataset to study broader applications of agentic review and fill the data-scarcity gap for open reviewer training. Experiments show that agentic review continuously improves PRs through a generate-review-revise loop, outperforms single-turn fixed-context review in both decision accuracy and resolve rate after revision, transfers beyond review to improve issue-resolution models, and enables effective and efficient test-time scaling. These results position agentic code review as a practical mechanism for moving AI coding agents from one-shot PR generation toward closed-loop issue resolution.
title_zh: SWE-Review：以代理式代码审查实现问题解决的闭环
abstract_zh: 编码智能体越来越多地为现实世界的软件问题生成拉取请求（PR），但单次PR生成仍处于开环状态：PR在提出时缺乏系统性的审查、诊断或修订。我们提出 **SWE-Review**，这是一个通过智能体代码审查来闭合这一循环的框架。给定一个问题和一个AI生成的PR，审查智能体会探索代码仓库，决定是否接受该PR，并提供结构化的反馈以进行修订。我们通过所提出的 **SWE-Review-Bench** 评估这一设定，以衡量审查的正确性和下游修订的有用性。我们进一步整理 **SWE-Review-Traj** 数据集，以研究智能体审查的更广泛应用，并填补开放审查者训练中的数据稀缺空缺。实验表明，智能体审查通过“生成-审查-修订”循环持续改进PR，在决策准确性和修订后的解决率方面均优于单轮固定上下文审查，其能力超越审查本身，可提升问题解决模型，并实现高效且有效的测试时扩展。这些结果将智能体代码审查定位为一种实用机制，推动AI编码智能体从单次PR生成转向闭环问题解决。

title: Context-to-Execution Integrity for LLM Agents
authors: Igor Santos-Grueiro
abstract: Language-model agents read attacker-writable context to solve tasks. Tool execution needs a separate authority check for protected sink fields, sink-interpreted payloads, and the invocation event. Context-to-Execution Integrity (CXI) is an execution-boundary system for this setting. Policies mark protected sink fields, typed releases carry narrow validated values from writable context to specific destinations, opaque data slots keep evidence as data, and a deterministic gate admits a call only after field authority, exact-effect authorization, and invocation authority all bind to the same action manifest. We evaluate CXI on open-weight field-projection runs, AgentDojo live episodes, a code-agent exact-effect benchmark, manifest-bound ledger faults, proposal-pressure controls, and hosted/API compatibility traces. AgentDojo covers 720 live episodes and 1,739 LLM calls; the code-agent benchmark covers 400 repository episodes with exact-effect authorization and lease-bound execution, yielding 231 safe task completions and zero observed field, effect, or invocation escapes. The accounting reports parser outcomes, authorization outcomes, and task-quality outcomes together with the admission-integrity result. Across the evaluated sinks, CXI admits execution only when field, effect, and invocation authority bind to the same action manifest.
title_zh: LLM代理的上下文到执行完整性
abstract_zh: 语言模型代理读取攻击者可写的上下文来执行任务。工具执行需要对受保护接收字段、接收解释载荷以及调用事件进行独立的权限检查。上下文到执行完整性（CXI）是针对此场景的执行边界系统。策略标记受保护接收字段，类型化发布将狭窄的验证值从可写上下文传递到特定目标，不透明数据槽将证据作为数据保留，确定性的门控仅在字段权限、精确效果授权和调用权限均绑定到同一操作清单时才允许调用。我们在开源权重字段投影运行、AgentDojo 实时剧集、代码代理精确效果基准测试、清单绑定账本故障、提议压力控制以及托管/API 兼容性追踪上评估了 CXI。AgentDojo 涵盖 720 个实时剧集和 1,739 次 LLM 调用；代码代理基准测试涵盖 400 个仓库剧集，采用精确效果授权和租约绑定执行，产生了 231 次安全任务完成，且未观察到字段、效果或调用逃逸。账目报告输出解析结果、授权结果和任务质量结果，以及准入完整性结果。在评估的接收字段中，CXI 仅在字段、效果和调用权限绑定到同一操作清单时才允许执行。

title: Hidden Amplifiers: Cross-Level Risk in Software Supply Chains
authors: Rakesh Podder, Rafael Fabian Gonzalez Arellano, Indrajit Ray
abstract: Modern software supply chains comprise hundreds of transitive dependencies, yet existing analysis tools operate at either the ecosystem level (dependency graphs) or the code level (static analysis within packages). This separation creates two failure modes. First, false-positive CVE alerts for unreachable code. Second, blind spots for structurally critical micro-dependencies. We introduce cross-level risk propagation, a framework that bridges code-level risk metrics with ecosystem-level dependency exposure through a unified risk formula. Preliminary evaluation on 50 packages across npm and PyPI reveals a class of hidden amplifiers -- micro-dependencies with fewer than 50 methods but over 50,000 dependents -- that carry outsized supply-chain risk invisible to all current Software Composition Analysis (SCA) tools. Without cross-level analysis, such packages can harbor exploitable code for years because no current tool considers both internal code structure and ecosystem position simultaneously. These results suggest that cross-level analysis opens a new design space for supply-chain security.
title_zh: 隐藏放大器：软件供应链中的跨层级风险
abstract_zh: 现代软件供应链包含数百个传递性依赖，然而现有的分析工具要么在生态系统层面（依赖图）运行，要么在代码层面（包内静态分析）运行。这种分离导致了两种故障模式：第一，对不可达代码产生误报的CVE警报；第二，对结构关键性微依赖存在盲区。我们引入了跨层级风险传播框架，该框架通过统一的风险公式将代码级风险指标与生态系统级依赖暴露度相连接。对npm和PyPI上50个包的初步评估揭示了一类隐藏的放大器——方法数少于50但依赖者超过5万的微依赖——它们承载着超额的供应链风险，而所有现有的软件成分分析工具均无法察觉。缺乏跨层级分析时，这类包可能长期隐藏可利用的代码，因为现有工具没有同时考虑内部代码结构和生态系统位置。这些结果表明，跨层级分析为供应链安全开辟了新的设计空间。

title: Unicode TAG-Block Concealment of Tool-Metadata Payloads in the Model Context Protocol: An Approval-View Fidelity Gap Across Three Independent Server Implementations
authors: Mohammadreza Rashidi
abstract: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is the dominant way coding agents discover and invoke external tools. A server advertises each tool through a tools/list handshake that returns a name, a natural-language description, and a JSON input schema. The client renders this metadata once, in a one-time approval dialog, and then injects it verbatim into the model's context on every subsequent turn. Nothing in the protocol requires the rendered approval view and the bytes delivered to the model to match. We isolate that gap as a single structural mechanism, concealment encoding, and show with a model-free, protocol-free analysis that Unicode's TAG block (U+E0000 to U+E007F) has no assigned glyph in any mainstream terminal, chat, or IDE renderer, so a payload written in it is absent from what a human reviewer sees while surviving byte-for-byte into the model's tokenizer. We then measure whether this mechanism actually defeats today's client-side defenses, building a proof-of-concept that speaks the real MCP JSON-RPC/stdio protocol against a genuine client and server. Across 5 distinct MCP metadata surfaces we implement 8 concrete techniques with a deterministic, protocol-level harness. All 8/8 techniques deliver an attacker-controlled payload into the model's context, 4/8 evade a representative string-matching sanitizer, and exactly as the mechanism analysis predicts, only the TAG-block encoding (1/8) is invisible in the human approval view while still reaching the model verbatim. MCP forces re-approval for 0/8 techniques even under a time-of-check to time-of-use rug-pull. To test whether these outcomes are a property of the protocol or an artifact of one server codebase, we re-implement the catalogue against 3 independently developed Python MCP server libraries and find total agreement across all 32 cross-library outcome cells. The baseline sanitizer flags 0 of 25 benign descriptions.
title_zh: 模型上下文协议中基于Unicode标签块隐藏工具元数据载荷的方法：三个独立服务器实现间的审批视图保真度差距
abstract_zh: 模型上下文协议（MCP）是编码智能体发现并调用外部工具的主流方式。服务器通过一次 `tools/list` 握手来通告每个工具，该握手返回一个名称、一段自然语言描述以及一个 JSON 输入模式。客户端在一次性的审批对话框中呈现这些元数据，然后在后续的每一轮交互中将其原样注入到模型的上下文里。协议中没有任何内容要求审批视图与传递给模型的字节数据必须一致。我们将这一间隙提炼为单一的结构性机制——隐藏编码，并通过无模型、无协议的分析证明：Unicode 的 TAG 块（U+E0000 至 U+E007F）在任何主流的终端、聊天或 IDE 渲染器中都没有对应的字形，因此用其书写的载荷在人类审查者眼中不可见，却能逐字节存活于模型的分词器中。接着，我们测量这一机制是否真的能突破当今的客户端防御，构建了一个概念验证：它使用真实的 MCP JSON-RPC/stdio 协议，与实际客户端和服务器通信。在 5 个不同的 MCP 元数据表面上，我们通过确定性的协议级测试框架实现了 8 种具体技术。全部 8/8 技术都能将攻击者控制的载荷送入模型上下文，其中 4/8 规避了典型的字符串匹配消毒器，并且与机制分析的预测完全一致：只有 TAG 块编码（1/8）在人类审批视图中不可见，同时仍能逐字到达模型。即便在检查时点到使用时点的 rug-pull 攻击下，MCP 也强制要求对 0/8 的技术进行重新审批。为了验证这些结果是协议本身的属性还是单一服务器代码库的产物，我们针对三个独立开发的 Python MCP 服务器库重新实现了上述目录，发现在全部 32 个跨库结果单元格中完全一致。基线消毒器对 25 个良性描述均无告警。

title: Beyond Refusal: A Same-Lineage Study of Aligned and Abliterated LLMs for Vulnerability Analysis
authors: Mingchen Li, Meikang Qiu, Zifan Peng, Heng Fan, Song Fu, Junhua Ding, Yunhe Feng
abstract: Large language model (LLM)-assisted software security operates at a difficult boundary: the vulnerability-analysis terminology needed for legitimate code review, triage, and repair can closely resemble terminology associated with misuse. Existing safety and cybersecurity evaluations are difficult to interpret in this setting because they often compare unrelated model families, thereby conflating safety behavior with differences in architecture, scale, training data, and deployment. To isolate this factor, we study safety state: whether refusal behavior remains intact (Aligned) or has been refusal-ablated (Abliterated) within same-lineage models. We ask how this safety state affects defensive utility across software-security workflows. We compare aligned instruction-tuned models with publicly released refusal-ablated descendants from two model families, Gemma and Qwen. We evaluate Aligned and Abliterated states on vulnerability detection, CWE attribution, vulnerable-line localization, root-cause localization, and executable patch validation. We further treat prompt wording as a controlled framing dimension: prompts begin with neutral code-review language, add authorization context, and vary the density of cybersecurity terminology. In a Gemma-based Java/Vul4J repair-validation study, Abliterated achieves higher early-stage validation rates, with 67.8%, 65.0%, and 32.8% of patches judged usable, successfully applied, and successfully compiled, respectively, compared with 29.9%, 24.9%, and 9.0% for Aligned. In the Qwen pair, Abliterated improves localization performance, increasing line-level F1 from 2.08% to 3.91% and Top-1 accuracy from 4.10% to 6.95%. These findings suggest that evaluations of LLM-based security assistants should jointly measure whether models respond, whether their usable responses are correct, and whether their outputs remain actionable across the engineering workflow.
title_zh: 超越拒绝：对齐与消融大语言模型的同源漏洞分析研究
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型辅助的软件安全处于一个棘手边界：用于合法代码审查、分类和修复的漏洞分析术语，可能与滥用相关术语十分相似。现有的安全与网络安全评估在此情境下难以解读，因为它们常比较不同模型家族，从而将安全行为与架构、规模、训练数据和部署方式的差异混为一谈。为分离这一因素，本研究聚焦于“安全状态”——即同一谱系模型内，拒绝行为保持完整（对齐状态）或已被拒绝消融（消融状态）的情况。我们探究这一安全状态如何影响软件安全工作流中的防御效用。我们对比了两个模型家族（Gemma 与 Qwen）中对齐指令微调模型及其公开的拒绝消融衍生版本，在漏洞检测、CWE归因、脆弱行定位、根因定位及可执行补丁验证任务上评估对齐与消融两种状态。进一步地，我们将提示措辞作为受控框架维度：提示以中性代码审查语言开头，加入授权上下文，并改变网络安全术语的密集程度。在基于Gemma的Java/Vul4J修复验证研究中，消融模型取得了更高的早期验证率：补丁被认为可用、成功应用和成功编译的比例分别为67.8%、65.0%和32.8%，而对齐模型则分别仅为29.9%、24.9%和9.0%。在Qwen模型对中，消融模型提升了定位性能：行级F1值从2.08%提升至3.91%，Top-1准确率从4.10%提升至6.95%。这些发现表明，对基于LLM的安全助手的评估应同时衡量：模型是否响应、其有效响应是否正确、以及输出在整个工程工作流中是否仍具可操作性。

title: LogicHunter: Testing LLM Agent Frameworks with an Agentic Oracle
authors: Minghui Long, Yanjie Zhao, Haoyu Wang
abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agent frameworks such as LangChain, LlamaIndex, and CrewAI have become critical infrastructure powering production AI systems, yet they remain severely under-tested due to fundamental challenges in automated testing. Unlike traditional software, where crashes serve as reliable oracles, defects in these pure Python frameworks manifest as ordinary exceptions or silent semantic failures, creating profound oracle ambiguity. This problem is exacerbated by strict type governance through Pydantic schemas and complex protocol requirements that cause existing fuzzers to generate overwhelming invalid inputs, while traditional test generators produce only trivial cases with weak regression assertions. We present LogicHunter, a fuzzing framework that addresses both the generation and oracle challenges through active specification-aware testing. LogicHunter employs specification-driven generation that systematically fuses formal type constraints with authentic usage patterns from real-world repositories, synthesizing inputs that are valid by construction yet semantically extreme, equipped with behavioral probes to expose silent failures. To resolve oracle ambiguity, we introduce the Agentic Oracle, which transcends passive classification by actively retrieving documentation, navigating source code, and inspecting runtime states through a ReAct-based architecture with Dual-Layer State Management and Dual-Stream Memory. Evaluated on three widely deployed frameworks, LogicHunter discovered 40 previously unknown bugs with 30 confirmed and 26 fixed by developers, while state-of-the-art baselines reported no bugs as final findings. The Agentic Oracle achieves 91.17% precision, surpassing the best passive approach at 29.27% by 61 percentage points.
title_zh: LogicHunter：使用智能体预言机测试大语言模型智能体框架
abstract_zh: 诸如LangChain、LlamaIndex和CrewAI等大型语言模型（LLM）智能体框架已成为支撑生产级AI系统的关键基础设施，然而由于自动化测试中存在的根本性挑战，这些框架的测试仍严重不足。与传统软件中崩溃可作为可靠的测试预言不同，这些纯Python框架的缺陷表现为常规异常或无声的语义故障，造成了深刻的预言歧义。这一问题因Pydantic模式下的严格类型管控以及复杂的协议要求而进一步加剧：现有模糊测试工具会产生大量无效输入，而传统测试生成器仅能生成带有弱回归断言的琐碎用例。我们提出LogicHunter——一种通过主动的规范感知测试来应对生成与预言双重挑战的模糊测试框架。LogicHunter采用规范驱动的生成策略，系统性地融合形式化类型约束与来自真实仓库的典型使用模式，合成出构造上有效但语义上极端的输入，并配备行为探针以暴露无声故障。为解决预言歧义，我们引入智能体预言（Agentic Oracle），它通过ReAct架构（具备双层状态管理与双流记忆）主动检索文档、导航源代码并检查运行时状态，从而超越被动分类能力。在三个广泛部署的框架上的评估显示，LogicHunter发现了40个此前未知的缺陷，其中30个已确认、26个已由开发者修复，而现有最优基线方法未报告任何最终发现的缺陷。智能体预言实现了91.17%的精确率，比最佳被动方法（29.27%）高出61个百分点。

title: Static Metrics Are Insufficient: Predicting Java Method Energy Usage with Execution Time
authors: Muhammad Imran, Vincenzo Stoico, Ivano Malavolta
abstract: The increasing energy demand of software systems is raising concerns about their environmental impact and associated costs. Reasoning on energy usage early in the development flow has the potential to significantly reduce the overall energy usage of a software system, as it allows developers to make informed design and refactoring decisions before inefficiencies propagate. However, assessing energy usage without repeated profiling and direct measurement is difficult, which limits early reasoning in practice. This study investigates the limits of method-level energy prediction in Java, examining whether static source code metrics complemented with method-level execution time can estimate the energy consumption of Java methods. We profile 2,786 Java methods to extract 33 static features and measure execution time and energy, then train and compare eleven regression models. Our findings show that static source code metrics alone yield poor predictive performance, with average R2 values close to zero. Incorporating execution time as a lightweight dynamic input significantly improves accuracy, raising R2 to as high as 0.46. Execution time, internal method calls, and cyclomatic complexity consistently emerge as the strongest predictors of energy consumption.
title_zh: 静态指标不足：通过执行时间预测Java方法的能耗
abstract_zh: 软件系统的能源需求日益增长，引发了对环境影响和相关成本的担忧。在开发流程早期对能耗进行推理，有可能显著降低软件系统的整体能耗，因为这能使开发者在低效问题扩散前做出明智的设计和重构决策。然而，在缺乏反复分析和直接测量的情况下评估能耗较为困难，这限制了实践中的早期推理。本研究探讨了Java方法级能耗预测的局限性，考察了静态源代码度量结合方法级执行时间是否能估算Java方法的能耗。我们对2786个Java方法进行了分析，提取了33个静态特征并测量了执行时间和能耗，随后训练并比较了十一种回归模型。我们的研究结果表明，仅凭静态源代码度量预测效果较差，平均R²值接近零。而将执行时间作为轻量级动态输入纳入后，预测精度显著提升，R²最高可达0.46。执行时间、内部方法调用和圈复杂度始终是能耗的最强预测因子。

title: Prompt Coach: An Empirical Evaluation of an Agentic Tutor for Learning Prompt Engineering in Software Development
authors: Rohit Mehra, Kapil Singi, Vikrant Kaulgud, Vibhu Saujanya Sharma, Swapnajeet Gon Choudhury, Swati Sharma, Adam P. Burden, Majd Sakr
abstract: Prompt engineering has emerged as a critical yet undertaught skill for software developers, one that traditional learning approaches are ill-equipped to support given its evolving, interactive, and context-dependent nature. In this paper, we introduce Prompt Coach (PC), an agentic tutor that helps developers learn how to craft high-quality code-generation prompts through Socratic guidance embedded in-flow within their IDE. PC evaluates prompt quality across multiple dimensions and surfaces targeted questions to guide self-correction, grounded in the developer's codebase and the behavior of the target LLM. We present an early empirical study with 15 professional developers combining quantitative prompt quality scoring with qualitative perception measures. Participants showed statistically significant improvements after a single 60-minute session, with the largest gains across dimensions commonly overlooked by developers. They also reported strong trust, high adoption readiness, and unanimous agreement that PC improved their prompt-writing skills.
title_zh: Prompt Coach：一种用于学习软件开发中提示工程的自主导师的实证评估
abstract_zh: 提示工程已成为软件开发人员一项关键但尚未得到充分教授的技能，鉴于其不断发展、交互性强且依赖上下文的特性，传统学习方法难以有效支持。本文介绍了Prompt Coach（PC），一种智能辅导系统，通过嵌入开发者IDE的苏格拉底式引导，帮助开发者学习如何构建高质量的代码生成提示。PC从多个维度评估提示质量，并基于开发者的代码库和目标大语言模型的行为，提出有针对性的问题引导自我修正。我们开展了一项初步实证研究，邀请了15名专业开发者，结合定量提示质量评分与定性感知评估。参与者在仅60分钟的单次课程后，其提示质量在统计上表现出显著提升，尤其在开发者普遍忽视的维度上改进最大。他们还报告了高度信任、高采纳意愿，并一致认为PC提升了他们的提示编写技能。

title: UI2App: Benchmarking Visual Interaction Inference in Executable Web Application Generation
authors: Grace Man Chen, Litao Guo, Yifan Wu, Yiyu Chen, Yenchi Tseng, Sicheng Liu, Yuyu Luo, Ying-Cong Chen
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated growing competence in web page generation. However, existing text-driven approaches rely on complex prompts that impose substantial demands on users and offer limited expressivity for page layout and cross-page visual coherence. Image-driven paradigms, which take UI screenshots as input, align more closely with real development workflows. However, current benchmarks focus primarily on visual fidelity and lack a systematic evaluation of the interaction capabilities in generated artifacts. To address this gap, we introduce UI2App, the first benchmark targeting interaction inference, the ability to recover application behavior from screenshots alone, without any textual or behavioral guidance. UI2App comprises 327 screenshots grouped into 45 state-coherent screenshot sets for runnable multi-route web applications. We design an end-to-end pipeline that evaluates each artifact along four dimensions: executability, navigation reachability, visual fidelity, and interaction inference. The interaction metric (IIS) assesses inferred interactions by functional correctness and state-management complexity, crediting any valid implementation rather than matching a single reference. Experiments on six frontier vision-language models reveal a marked capability mismatch between visual reconstruction and interaction realization: the visual-fidelity leader scores only 7.5 on IIS, ranking fourth and trailing the IIS leader by 5.2x. High-complexity interactions such as cross-page state remain a pervasive bottleneck, with half of the evaluated models scoring exactly zero on this dimension. Overall, the results indicate that inferring complete interaction behavior from static screenshots remains a key challenge for models.
title_zh: UI2App：可执行Web应用生成中的视觉交互推理基准测试
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在网页生成方面已展现出日益增强的能力。然而，现有的文本驱动方法依赖于复杂的提示词，对用户提出较高要求，且在页面布局和跨页面视觉连贯性方面表达能力有限。以图像为驱动的范式（将UI截图作为输入）更贴近实际的开发流程。然而，当前基准测试主要聚焦于视觉保真度，缺乏对生成制品交互能力的系统性评估。为填补这一空白，我们引入UI2App——首个针对交互推理（即仅从屏幕截图恢复应用程序行为，无需任何文本或行为指导）的基准测试。UI2App包含327张截图，按45个状态连贯的截图集合分组，对应可运行的多路线网页应用。我们设计了一条端到端流水线，从四个维度评估每个制品：可执行性、导航可达性、视觉保真度和交互推理。交互指标（IIS）依据功能正确性和状态管理复杂度对推断的交互进行评分，认可任何有效的实现方式，而非与单一参考结果匹配。对六种前沿视觉-语言模型的实验揭示了视觉重建与交互实现之间的显著能力差距：视觉保真度领先的模型在IIS上仅得7.5分，排名第四，落后IIS领先模型5.2倍。高复杂度交互（如跨页面状态）仍普遍存在瓶颈，评估模型中有一半在此维度上得分为零。总体而言，结果表明，从静态截图推断完整交互行为对模型而言仍是一项关键挑战。

title: Compiling Bioinformatics Recurrences
authors: Bala Vinaithirthan, Shiv Sundram, Sneha Goenka, Fredrik Kjolstad
abstract: Many bioinformatics algorithms, such as sequence alignment and structure prediction, can be expressed as recurrence equations over a dynamic programming matrix. Efficient implementations of these algorithms for large-scale biological data often require changing the order in which matrix cells are calculated and pruning ineffectual regions of the matrix from consideration altogether, but these techniques typically complicate implementation. We introduce FILTR, a domain-specific language (DSL) and compiler framework for bioinformatics recurrences. FILTR keeps the core recurrence rules separate from the pruning and scheduling strategies, where pruning acts as an approximation to limit where in the DP matrix cells are computed, and scheduling determines the iteration order for how cells are explored. FILTR compiles these high-level descriptions into optimized C++ code that matches the performance of hand-tuned implementations while enabling rapid exploration of new heuristics. FILTR is competitive with hand-optimized sequence-alignment libraries, ranging from 0.95x to 30x faster across biological benchmarks.
title_zh: 编译生物信息学递归
abstract_zh: 许多生物信息学算法，如序列比对和结构预测，可以表示为基于动态规划矩阵的递推方程。针对大规模生物数据的高效实现，通常需要改变矩阵单元格的计算顺序，并完全剔除矩阵中无效的区域，但这些技术往往使实现复杂化。我们提出了FILTR——一种用于生物信息学递推的领域特定语言（DSL）及编译器框架。FILTR将核心递推规则与剪枝策略和调度策略分离，其中剪枝作为一种近似方法，用于限制动态规划矩阵中计算单元格的范围，而调度则决定了探索单元格的迭代顺序。FILTR将这些高层描述编译为优化的C++代码，其性能可与手工调优的实现相媲美，同时支持快速探索新的启发式方法。在生物基准测试中，FILTR与手工优化的序列比对库相比，速度提升范围为0.95倍至30倍。

title: FlexRC: A Flexible Multi-Point Model Order Reduction Method for Many-Port RC Networks
authors: Yuncheng Xu, Siyuan Yin, Lin Liu, Fan Yang, Xuan Zeng, Chengtao An, Yangfeng Su
abstract: Efficient model order reduction for many-port resistor-capacitor (RC) networks is essential in post-layout circuit simulation. Existing high-accuracy elimination-based methods have certain limitations, such as fixed frequency points, large reduced-order models, or high reduction cost. This paper proposes FlexRC, a flexible multi-point model order reduction method for many-port RC networks. FlexRC starts from the same elimination step as previous methods, and then constructs a nonorthogonal projection basis by a modified block rational Arnoldi process to generate a sparse banded reduced model. FlexRC features three adjustable components: user-specified frequency points, a tolerance-controlled port-reduction technique for the internal subsystem, and an optional sparsity-control strategy. We discuss passivity under port-reduction perturbations, analyze moment matching, and provide a conservative error estimate for port reduction. Numerical experiments on industrial RC examples and IBM power-grid examples demonstrate the effectiveness of FlexRC in terms of reduction time and transient simulation time.
title_zh: FlexRC：面向多端口RC网络的灵活多点模型降阶方法
abstract_zh: 在多端口电阻电容（RC）网络的后布局电路仿真中，高效的模型降阶至关重要。现有基于消除的高精度方法存在一些局限性，例如固定频率点、降阶模型规模较大或降阶成本较高。本文提出FlexRC，一种用于多端口RC网络的灵活多点模型降阶方法。FlexRC从与先前方法相同的消除步骤开始，然后通过改进的块有理Arnoldi过程构建非正交投影基，以生成稀疏带状降阶模型。FlexRC具有三个可调组件：用户指定的频率点、针对内部子系统的容差控制端口缩减技术，以及可选稀疏性控制策略。我们讨论了端口缩减扰动下的无源性，分析了矩匹配，并给出了端口缩减的保守误差估计。在工业RC实例和IBM电源网格实例上的数值实验表明，FlexRC在降阶时间和瞬态仿真时间方面具有有效性。

title: Beyond the Syntax: Do Security Experts Trust LLMs for NIDS Rule Engineering?
authors: Lorenzo di Filippo, Enkeleda Bardhi, Andrea Agiollo, Alessandro Palma, Silvia Bonomi, Fernando Kuipers
abstract: As network threats evolve, manual NIDS rule engineering has become a critical operational bottleneck. While Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise for automating this process, their ability to produce production-ready rules remains unvalidated. This paper presents a human-centered investigation into LLM-based NIDS rule engineering, formalizing a grounded generation framework and evaluating it through a user study with 10 domain experts. Our evaluation reveals a syntax-semantics paradox: although LLMs generate syntactically correct rules, experts find them only partially deployable due to low specificity and logic hallucinations in 12% of cases. While the system received a favorable SUS score of 67, practitioners remain skeptical of its autonomous capabilities, viewing LLMs as support tools for drafting and verification rather than independent generators. Finally, our statistical analysis indicates that while large-scale models ($\geq 70B$) consistently produce syntactically valid rules, small models ($\leq 4B$) are largely ineffective for IDS rule generation.
title_zh: 语法之外：安全专家是否信任大语言模型进行NIDS规则工程？
abstract_zh: 随着网络威胁的不断演变，人工编制网络入侵检测系统（NIDS）规则已成为关键的操作瓶颈。尽管大语言模型（LLMs）在自动化这一过程中展现出潜力，但其生成可直接投入生产的规则的能力尚未得到验证。本文围绕基于LLM的NIDS规则工程开展以人为中心的研究，提出一个基于实际经验的生成框架，并通过一项包含10位领域专家的用户研究对其进行评估。评估结果揭示了“语法-语义悖论”：尽管LLM能够生成语法正确的规则，但由于12%的案例存在低特异性和逻辑幻觉，专家认为这些规则仅部分可部署。虽然该系统获得了67分的系统可用性量表（SUS）评分（表现尚可），但从业者对其自主能力仍持怀疑态度，将LLM视为起草和验证的支持工具，而非独立的规则生成器。最后，我们的统计分析表明，大规模模型（≥70B参数）能够稳定生成语法有效的规则，而小规模模型（≤4B参数）在入侵检测系统（IDS）规则生成方面基本无效。

title: Detecting Vulnerability-Inducing Commits via Multi-Stage Reasoning with LLM-Based Agents
authors: Liyou Chen, Hailong Sun, Xiang Gao, Yue Pan
abstract: Detecting vulnerability-inducing commits (VICs) at submission time is critical for improving the security and reliability of software systems. However, this task is highly challenging because it requires reasoning about the semantic impact of code changes from heterogeneous information sources, including code diffs, commit messages, and the surrounding contextual code. Existing approaches often struggle to fully capture these complex interactions, resulting in limited detection performance. In this paper, we propose VIC-RAGENT, an LLM-based multi-agent framework for effective and explainable vulnerability detection. VIC-RAGENT leverages multiple specialized agents to provide complementary perspectives, including structural analysis, intent understanding, and vulnerability inspection. To further improve detection reliability, the framework employs a multi-stage reasoning process that progressively refines candidate vulnerabilities through preliminary inspection, reanalysis, and a final decision stage. Experimental results on a real-world dataset across multiple LLMs demonstrate that VIC-RAGENT consistently outperforms baselines, including Direct, CoT, and CodeAgent. Compared to the strongest baseline, VIC-RAGENT achieves 1.2-1.7x higher F1-scores across different models. Overall, VIC-RAGENT offers a robust, explainable, and practical solution for detecting VICs in modern software development workflows.
title_zh: 通过基于大语言模型的智能体进行多阶段推理来检测引发漏洞的提交
abstract_zh: 在提交时刻检测漏洞诱导提交（VICs）对于提升软件系统的安全性和可靠性至关重要。然而，这一任务极具挑战性，因为它需要从多种异构信息源（包括代码差异、提交消息和周围上下文代码）中推理代码更改的语义影响。现有方法往往难以充分捕捉这些复杂交互，导致检测性能有限。本文提出VIC-RAGENT，一种基于LLM的多智能体框架，用于高效且可解释的漏洞检测。VIC-RAGENT利用多个专门化智能体提供互补视角，包括结构分析、意图理解和漏洞审查。为进一步提升检测可靠性，该框架采用多阶段推理过程，通过初步审查、重新分析和最终决策阶段逐步精炼候选漏洞。在真实世界数据集上跨多个LLM的实验结果表明，VIC-RAGENT始终优于包括Direct、CoT和CodeAgent在内的基线方法。与最强基线相比，VIC-RAGENT在不同模型上的F1分数提升了1.2-1.7倍。总体而言，VIC-RAGENT为现代软件开发工作流中检测VICs提供了稳健、可解释且实用的解决方案。

title: Say What? Examining Text and Voice Input Modalities for Prompt-Based Programming in Computing Education
authors: Kaitlin Riegel, Yan Cathy Hua, Paul Denny, Victor-Alexandru Pădurean, Juho Leinonen, James Prather, Adish Singla
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into computing education, yet nearly all prior research has focused on text-based interactions. As voice-enabled interfaces become more capable and more common, there is growing interest in understanding how voice input might shape students' use of LLM-powered tools. In this exploratory study, we investigated how introductory programming students interact with Prompt Problems, which are programming tasks that require crafting natural-language prompts to generate correct code. Students (N = 919) solved a series of Prompt Problems with the freedom to select or switch between text and voice input modalities. We collected their prompt submissions as well as post-activity survey responses, then analysed differences in prompt accuracy, persistence, and perspectives by modality. For two of the three problems, we found that students who typed their prompts using text were more likely to have those prompts succeed on the first attempt than students who submitted unedited voice prompts. There was no difference in success rate if students edited their transcribed voice prompts before submission. Across the problems, we found evidence that students who tried voice prompting varied in their usage of modality - perhaps indicating a complementary, or non-preferential approach. However, most students only tried and reported preferring text. Our qualitative analysis revealed how students' perceived the roles of voice and text input in shaping their problem-solving process, as well as the reported drawbacks and advantages of each modality. We discuss implications for future multimodal tools and instructional design in computing education.
title_zh: “说什么？——探究计算教育中基于提示的编程的文本与语音输入模态”
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）正逐步融入计算机教育，然而此前几乎所有研究都聚焦于基于文本的交互方式。随着语音交互界面日益强大和普及，人们越来越关注语音输入可能如何影响学生对LLM工具的使用。在本探索性研究中，我们调查了编程入门学生如何与"提示问题"进行互动——这类编程任务需要学生通过编写自然语言提示来生成正确的代码。共有919名学生参与，他们可以自由选择文本或语音输入方式，并在不同问题间切换。我们收集了学生提交的提示内容及活动后调查问卷，并根据输入方式分析了提示准确性、持续性以及学生观点的差异。在三个问题中的两个问题上，我们发现通过文本输入提示的学生首次尝试成功的概率高于提交未经编辑的语音提示的学生。但如果学生对转写的语音提示进行编辑后再提交，成功率则无显著差异。跨问题分析显示，尝试语音提示的学生在使用方式上存在差异——这可能表明了一种互补性而非偏好性的策略。然而，大多数学生仅尝试了文本输入并报告其更偏好文本。我们的定性分析揭示了学生如何看待语音和文本输入在塑造问题解决过程中的作用，以及每种方式被报告的优势与不足。最后，我们讨论了这对未来计算教育中多模态工具和教学设计的影响。

title: Mitigating Errors in LLM-Generated Web API Invocations via Retrieval-Augmented Generation and Constrained Decoding
authors: Daniel Maninger, Leon Chemnitz, Jannis Brugger, Tushar Lamba, Amir Molzam Sharifloo, Mira Mezini
abstract: Integration of web APIs is a cornerstone of modern software systems, yet writing correct web API invocation code remains challenging due to complex and evolving API specifications. Although LLMs are increasingly used for code generation, previous work has empirically shown that their ability to generate correct web API integrations is limited. At the same time, mitigation techniques and their effectiveness for this setting remain insufficiently understood. In this paper, we propose and systematically evaluate retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and constrained decoding (CD) as two complementary approaches to improving LLM-generated web API invocation code. For RAG, we design a retriever that processes OpenAPI specifications and retrieves compact endpoint representations to inject into model prompts. For CD, we introduce an automatic translation from OpenAPI specifications to regex-based constraints enforced during generation. We evaluate both approaches on WAPIIBench's existing synthetic dataset and on a new real-world dataset derived from GitHub repositories. Our results show that RAG reduces hallucinations and improves correctness when generating full API invocations but reduces it when the endpoint is already provided as it encourages the generation of unnecessary parameters. In contrast, CD reliably prevents illegal URLs, HTTP methods, and arguments and substantially improves overall correctness for both starter codes.
title_zh: 通过检索增强生成和约束解码减少大语言模型生成的Web API调用中的错误
abstract_zh: Web API 的集成是现代软件系统的基石，但由于API规范复杂且不断演变，编写正确的Web API调用代码仍然具有挑战性。尽管LLM越来越多地用于代码生成，但以往的经验研究表明，它们生成正确Web API集成代码的能力有限。同时，针对这一场景的缓解技术及其有效性仍未得到充分理解。在本文中，我们提出并系统评估了检索增强生成（RAG）和约束解码（CD）作为两种互补方法，以改进LLM生成的Web API调用代码。对于RAG，我们设计了一个检索器，该检索器处理OpenAPI规范并检索紧凑的端点表示，注入到模型提示中。对于CD，我们引入了一种从OpenAPI规范到基于正则表达式的约束的自动转换，并在生成过程中强制执行这些约束。我们在WAPIIBench现有的合成数据集以及从GitHub仓库衍生的新真实数据集上评估了这两种方法。我们的结果表明，RAG在生成完整的API调用时减少了幻觉并提高了正确性，但在端点已经提供的情况下，由于它鼓励生成不必要的参数，正确性反而下降。相比之下，CD可靠地防止了非法的URL、HTTP方法和参数，并显著提高了两种起始代码的整体正确性。

title: SCOPE: Leveraging Subgoal Critiques for Code Generation
authors: Yueke Zhang, Yifan Zhang, Zihan Fang, Kevin Leach, Wei Zhang, Yu Huang
abstract: Code generation with large language models (LLMs) remains unreliable because generated programs can appear correct while still violating key semantic requirements in the natural language specification. Existing feedback-based methods improve over coder-only generation, but they often rely on unstructured critique or execution signals that do not explicitly identify what the code is semantically missing. We present SCOPE, a prover-initialized subgoal critic for code generation. SCOPE adapts a Lean-oriented prover model to produce three parseable feedback fields for downstream code generation: subgoals, gap analysis, and a robustness checklist. Our approach combines supervised fine-tuning, process-aligned reinforcement learning (RL), and feedback-guided inference, with two complementary rewards during RL: a dense reward for structured critique quality and a sparse reward based on whether the critique improves the coder's execution score. Experiments show that SCOPE improves over the compared feedback baselines. On LiveCodeBench V6, SCOPE achieves 39.4% pass@1, compared with 36.6% for Reflexion and 20.6% for the coder-only baseline. On BigCodeBench (Hard), it reaches 42.6%, surpassing Reflexion at 36.5% and coder-only generation at 34.5%. Further analysis shows that SCOPE's gains are concentrated in tasks with concrete semantic constraints and that its code corrections are more localized than Reflexion's.
title_zh: SCOPE: 利用子目标批判进行代码生成
abstract_zh: 使用大型语言模型（LLM）进行代码生成仍然不可靠，因为生成的程序可能看似正确，但仍会违反自然语言规范中的关键语义要求。现有的基于反馈的方法优于仅代码生成的方法，但它们往往依赖非结构化的批评或执行信号，这些信号并未明确指出代码在语义上缺失什么。我们提出SCOPE，一个由证明器初始化的子目标批评器，用于代码生成。SCOPE改编了一个面向Lean的证明器模型，以生成三个可解析的反馈字段供下游代码生成使用：子目标、差距分析和鲁棒性检查表。我们的方法结合了监督微调、过程对齐的强化学习（RL）以及反馈引导的推理，并在RL中采用两种互补的奖励：针对结构化批评质量的密集奖励，以及基于批评是否提高编码器执行分数的稀疏奖励。实验表明，SCOPE优于所比较的反馈基线。在LiveCodeBench V6上，SCOPE达到39.4%的pass@1，而Reflexion为36.6%，仅代码基线为20.6%。在BigCodeBench（困难）上，它达到42.6%，超过Reflexion的36.5%和仅代码生成的34.5%。进一步分析表明，SCOPE的收益集中在具有具体语义约束的任务上，并且其代码修正比Reflexion更局部化。

title: Plainbook: Data Science, in Plain Language
authors: Luca de Alfaro, Mathis Aubert, Ranjit Jhala, Eliana Pastor, Elena Baralis
abstract: Jupyter Notebooks have become widely adopted in data science, as they allow the sharing of reproducible computational analysis. They are, however, accessible only to people who understand computer code. To reach the broader audience of scientists interested in data analysis and computation, but unfamiliar with code, we introduce Plainbook, notebooks centered on natural language rather than code. Plainbook is based on two principles: promote the natural language descriptions, and verify the values. In plainbook, the natural language descriptions are preserved, rather than the resulting code; the code is generated automatically from the cell descriptions. As natural language is read top to bottom, Plainbook adopts a linear execution semantics, in which cells are guaranteed to be executed in the order in which they appear; there is no "hidden state" or out-of-order execution as in Jupyter. To allow users who may not understand code to verify the correctness of the computation, we have built into Plainbook verification mechanisms centered on values and value inspection. These include mechanisms that focus on individual cells, akin to unit tests, as well as global mechanisms. Both the linear execution semantics, and the verification mechanisms, are underpinned by a snapshot kernel that caches execution states and makes execution and verification efficient.
title_zh: Plainbook：数据科学，通俗易懂
abstract_zh: Jupyter Notebooks 在数据科学领域已广泛采用，因为它们支持共享可重复的计算分析。然而，只有理解计算机代码的人才能使用它们。为了面向更广泛的、对数据分析和计算感兴趣但不懂代码的科学家群体，我们推出了 Plainbook——一种以自然语言而非代码为核心的笔记本。Plainbook 基于两个原则：突出自然语言描述，并验证数值。在 Plainbook 中，保留的是自然语言描述，而非生成的代码；代码会根据单元格描述自动生成。由于自然语言是从上到下阅读的，Plainbook 采用了线性执行语义，确保单元格按其出现顺序执行；与 Jupyter 不同，不存在“隐藏状态”或乱序执行。为了让不懂代码的用户也能验证计算的正确性，我们在 Plainbook 中内置了以数值和数值检查为核心的验证机制。这些机制包括类似单元测试的、针对单个单元格的机制，以及全局机制。线性执行语义和验证机制都依赖于一个快照内核，该内核缓存执行状态，使执行和验证更加高效。
